title: camp security advisory
description: A published security advisory for a third-party plugin (RFC §5.3). Advisories are authoritative index content: signed objects living at index/advisories/<component>/<id>.yml. They warn administrators running affected versions, surface in Composer's audit tooling, and — when revoke is true — remove affected versions from installation entirely (the artifact stays archived for forensics; the ledger is never rewritten).

title.description: One-line summary, e.g. "CSRF in export endpoint".

affected-versions.description: Version constraint in Composer syntax, comma = AND, e.g. ">=1.0,<1.4.2" or "<2.0". Matched against the release ledger's version field.

fixed-in.description: First safe version, if a fix exists.

revoke.description: Severe cases only: remove affected versions from installation channels (Composer metadata and client plugin). Archived artifacts are preserved (RFC §5.3).

description.description: What the vulnerability is, impact, and what administrators should do. Sanitized markdown.
